add-png-image-pdf-filemend.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
add-png-image-pdf-filemend.description: Demonstrates binding an existing PDF with PdfFileMend and inserting a PNG image onto page two at specified coordinates.

replace-image-bmp.title: Replace JPEG Image on PDF Page with BMP using PdfContentEditor
replace-image-bmp.description: Demonstrates how to replace a JPEG image on the first page of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

overlay-gif-onto-png.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF onto PNG in PDF using CompositingParameters
overlay-gif-onto-png.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent GIF image onto an existing PNG image on the same PDF page using PdfFileMend and CompositingParameters.

add-footer-word-wrap.title: Add Word‑by‑Word Wrapped Footer to PDF Pages
add-footer-word-wrap.description: Demonstrates adding a formatted text footer with automatic word‑by‑word wrapping to every page of a PDF using PdfFileStamp.

add-promotional-text-pages.title: Add Promotional Text to Specific PDF Pages
add-promotional-text-pages.description: Demonstrates how to insert the same promotional message on pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using PdfFileStamp.AddText with multiple page numbers.

add-multi-line-text-page-three.title: Add Multi-Line Text Block with Custom Line Spacing to Page Three
add-multi-line-text-page-three.description: Demonstrates adding a left-aligned multi-line text paragraph with custom line spacing to the third page of a PDF.

image-text-watermark.title: Add Image and Text Watermark to PDF
image-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent text watermark on top of an image using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-background-png-image.title: Add Background PNG Image to All PDF Pages
add-background-png-image.description: Demonstrates how to add a PNG image as a background to every page of a PDF by iterating through pages and using PdfFileMend.AddImage.

add-header-image-multiple-pdfs.title: Add Header Image to Multiple PDFs
add-header-image-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a set of PDF files and add a header image to each using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp.

batch-add-company-logo.title: Batch Add Company Logo to PDFs
batch-add-company-logo.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder and adds a PNG logo to the top‑right corner of each page using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-png-signature-pdf.title: Insert PNG Signature on Every PDF Page using PdfFileMend
insert-png-signature-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of each page in a PDF.

add-tiff-image-last-page.title: Add TIFF Image to Last PDF Page using PdfFileMend
add-tiff-image-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to use PdfFileMend to add a TIFF image to the last page of an existing PDF without altering existing content.

place-image-dynamic.title: Place Image Dynamically Based on Page Size
place-image-dynamic.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF page size, calculate image coordinates, and add an image at a computed position using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-with-format-validation.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
add-image-with-format-validation.description: Demonstrates how to validate an image file's format before adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-file-mend-close.title: Add Image to PDF with PdfFileMend and Ensure Close()
pdf-file-mend-close.description: Demonstrates using PdfFileMend to add an image to a PDF and guarantees the facade is closed with a try‑finally block.

add-images-with-error-handling.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
add-images-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates adding images to a PDF page while catching exceptions from AddImage and logging the problematic image file path.

log-pdf-add-operations.title: Log AddImage and AddText Operations in PDF for Audit
log-pdf-add-operations.description: Demonstrates adding an image and a text snippet to a PDF using PdfFileMend while logging each operation with timestamp, page number, and source information for audit purposes.

add-paragraph-word-wrap-bywords.title: Add Paragraph with Word Wrap ByWords
add-paragraph-word-wrap-bywords.description: Demonstrates configuring WordWrapMode.ByWords for a TextParagraph before adding long text that exceeds the defined rectangle width.

add-image-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image to PDF Page Helper
add-image-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates a reusable helper method that inserts an image onto a specified page of a PDF at given coordinates.

add-image-http-response.title: Add Image to PDF and Return via HTTP Response
add-image-http-response.description: Demonstrates adding an image to a PDF using PdfFileMend, saving the result to a memory stream, and sending it to the client through an HttpResponse.

add-png-image-pdffilemend.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
add-png-image-pdffilemend.description: Demonstrates binding an existing PDF with PdfFileMend and inserting a PNG image onto page two at specified coordinates.

replace-image-bmp__v2.title: Replace JPEG Image on First Page with BMP Using PdfContentEditor
replace-image-bmp__v2.description: Demonstrates how to replace the first JPEG image on page one of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

overlay-gif-on-png.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF onto PNG in PDF using CompositingParameters
overlay-gif-on-png.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a PNG image and then overlaying a semi‑transparent GIF on the same page using PdfFileMend and CompositingParameters.

add-formatted-text-footer.title: Add Formatted Text Footer to PDF Pages
add-formatted-text-footer.description: Demonstrates adding a word‑by‑word wrapped formatted text footer to every page of a PDF using PdfFileStamp.

add-promotional-text.title: Add Promotional Text to Specific Pages
add-promotional-text.description: Demonstrates adding the same promotional message to pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using PdfFileStamp.AddText with multiple page numbers.

add-multi-line-text-page3.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Block with Custom Line Spacing to Page 3
add-multi-line-text-page3.description: Demonstrates adding a multi‑line text paragraph with custom line spacing to the left margin of the third page of a PDF.

image-text-watermark__v2.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark Over Image
image-text-watermark__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a semi‑transparent text watermark on top of an image using WatermarkArtifact.

add-background-png.title: Add Background PNG Image to All PDF Pages
add-background-png.description: Demonstrates how to add a PNG image as a background to every page of a PDF by iterating through pages and using PdfFileMend.AddImage.

add-header-image-multiple-pdfs__v2.title: Add Header Image to Multiple PDFs
add-header-image-multiple-pdfs__v2.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over a list of PDF files and add a header image to each using PdfFileStamp.

add-company-logo-batch.title: Add Company Logo to PDFs in Batch
add-company-logo-batch.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder and adds a PNG logo to the top‑right corner of each page.

insert-png-signature-pdf__v2.title: Insert PNG Signature on All PDF Pages using PdfFileMend
insert-png-signature-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend.

add-tiff-image-last-page__v2.title: Add TIFF Image to Last Page of PDF using PdfFileMend
add-tiff-image-last-page__v2.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, locate its last page, and add a TIFF image without altering existing content.

add-image-dynamic-coordinates.title: Add Image to PDF Page with Dynamic Coordinates
add-image-dynamic-coordinates.description: Demonstrates retrieving page dimensions from a PDF and placing an image at a calculated position based on those dimensions.

validate-image-format-add-image.title: Validate Image Format Before Adding to PDF
validate-image-format-add-image.description: Demonstrates checking an image file's format (JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP, TIFF) before adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-file-mend-close__v2.title: Add Image to PDF using PdfFileMend with guaranteed Close
pdf-file-mend-close__v2.description: Demonstrates how to modify a PDF with PdfFileMend and ensure the facade is closed using a try‑finally block.

add-images-with-error-handling__v2.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
add-images-with-error-handling__v2.description: Demonstrates adding images to a PDF page while catching exceptions from AddImage and logging the problematic image file path.

add-image-text-audit.title: Add Image and Text to PDF with Audit Logging
add-image-text-audit.description: Demonstrates adding an image to a PDF using PdfFileMend and logs each AddImage and AddText operation with timestamp, page number, and file name for audit purposes.

add-paragraph-wordwrap-bywords.title: Add Paragraph with WordWrap ByWords
add-paragraph-wordwrap-bywords.description: Demonstrates configuring WordWrapMode.ByWords for a text paragraph that exceeds its rectangle width, causing the text to wrap at word boundaries.

add-image-to-pdf-page__v2.title: Add Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
add-image-to-pdf-page__v2.description: Demonstrates a reusable helper method that inserts an image onto a specified page of a PDF at given coordinates.

add-image-to-pdf-memory-stream.title: Add Image to PDF and Return as Memory Stream
add-image-to-pdf-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates adding an image to a PDF using PdfFileMend, saving the result into a MemoryStream, and writing it to a file (simulating an HTTP response).

async-pdf-modification.title: Asynchronous PDF Modification with PdfFileMend
async-pdf-modification.description: Demonstrates how to modify a PDF asynchronously by adding an image using PdfFileMend wrapped in Task.Run.

extract-images-pdf-png.title: Extract Images from PDF to PNG Files
extract-images-pdf-png.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF document and save each as a separate PNG file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

extract-images-from-pages.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages
extract-images-from-pages.description: Extracts all images from pages 2 through 5 of a PDF and saves them into a temporary directory.

batch-extract-images.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page and Index Naming
batch-extract-images.description: Extracts all images from each PDF in a folder and saves them using the source PDF name, page number, and image index.

remove-image-from-page.title: Remove Specific Image from PDF Page Using PdfContentEditor
remove-image-from-page.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific image identified by its object ID from page four of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor.

remove-all-images.title: Remove All Images from PDF
remove-all-images.description: Demonstrates how to delete every image from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor and save the modified document.

replace-low-res-images.title: Replace Low-Resolution Images with High-Resolution PNGs in PDF
replace-low-res-images.description: Demonstrates how to loop through all images in a PDF and replace each with a higher‑resolution PNG file.

add-text-position-test.title: Verify Text Position on PDF Page
add-text-position-test.description: Adds text at specific X/Y coordinates in a PDF and checks that the coordinates match using Aspose.Pdf text extraction.

compare-pdf-size-after-image.title: Compare PDF Size Before and After Adding Image
compare-pdf-size-after-image.description: Loads a PDF, records its byte size, adds an image to the first page, then compares the byte sizes to verify the modification.
